name: submission_mode
label: Submission Mode
description: Choose between wizard (step-by-step) or single page submission mode.

name: chars_count
label: Character Count Limit
description: Maximum number of characters allowed in an abstract.

name: upload_limit
label: Upload Limit
description: Maximum number of files allowed per submission.

name: max_attach_size
label: Max Attachment Size
description: Maximum attachment size in bytes.

name: allowed_file_types
label: Allowed File Types
description: Allowed file types for abstract submissions.

name: show_attachments
label: Show Attachments Step
description: Display uploaded attachments.

name: show_author
label: Show Author Step
description: Display author names in the abstract view.

name: show_description
label: Show Abstract Description
description: Display abstract descriptions in the frontend.

name: attachment_pref
label: Attachment Preference
description: Set attachment preference as optional or required

name: accepted_status
label: Accepted Status
description: Status indicating an accepted abstract.

name: edit_status
label: Editable Statuses
description: Statuses where editing abstracts is allowed.

name: default_status
label: Default Abstract Status
description: Default status assigned to newly submitted abstracts.

name: submit_limit
label: Submission Limit
description: Maximum number of submissions allowed per author.

name: editor_media
label: Enable Media in Editor
description: Allow media uploads in the text editor.

name: enable_submission_emails
label: Enable Submission Emails
description: Enable email notifications for abstract submissions.

name: enable_revision_emails
label: Enable Revision Emails
description: Enable email notifications for abstract revisions.

name: enable_status_change_emails
label: Enable Status Change Emails
description: Enable email notifications for status changes.

name: enable_assignment_emails
label: Enable Assignment Emails
description: Enable email notifications for reviewer assignments.

name: enable_review_submission_emails
label: Enable Review Submission Emails
description: Enable email notifications for review submissions.

name: email_footer_branding
label: Show "Powered by SimplyConf" in Email Footer
description: Display "Powered by SimplyConf" branding in the email footer.

name: admin_notification_users
label: Admin Notification Users
description: Comma-separated list of admin user IDs to receive admin notifications.

name: sync_status
label: Sync Status
description: Enable syncing of status across events.

name: blind_review
label: Blind Review
description: Enable blind review (hide author details from reviewers).

name: show_reviews
label: Show Reviews to Authors
description: Allow authors to view reviews.

name: enable_user_registration
label: Enable User Registration
description: Enable user registration on the site.

name: enable_captcha
label: Enable CAPTCHA
description: Enable Google reCAPTCHA v3 for login and registration forms.

name: recaptcha_site_key
label: reCAPTCHA Site Key
description: Google reCAPTCHA v3 site key.

name: recaptcha_secret_key
label: reCAPTCHA Secret Key
description: Google reCAPTCHA v3 secret key. Never exposed to the frontend.

name: login_redirect
label: Login Redirect URL
description: URL to redirect users after login.

name: password_min_length
label: Minimum Password Length
description: Minimum number of characters required for passwords.

name: password_max_length
label: Maximum Password Length
description: Maximum number of characters allowed for passwords.

name: password_require_uppercase
label: Require Uppercase Letters
description: Require at least one uppercase letter in passwords.

name: password_require_lowercase
label: Require Lowercase Letters
description: Require at least one lowercase letter in passwords.

name: password_require_numbers
label: Require Numbers
description: Require at least one number in passwords.

name: password_require_symbols
label: Require Special Symbols
description: Require at least one special symbol in passwords.

name: auto_link_authors_to_users
label: Auto-Link Authors to WordPress Users
description: Automatically link authors to WordPress accounts by matching email addresses.
